level_signals: JD explicitly says 'You don't need a background in growth, SEO or marketing for this role'
Writing experience framed as 'either for college or personal projects' — suggests entry-to-mid level acceptable

must_haves.raw_text_from_jd: Can write high-quality and engaging content quickly - either for college or personal projects
Relatively technical - you use low-code and AI tooling like ChatGPT, Lovable, and n8n/Zapier

nice_to_haves.raw_text_from_jd: Experience scaling content creation at a high-growth tech company
Familiarity with SEO tools (SEMRush, Ahrefs, etc.) and content management systems
Background in B2B SaaS or AI/ML content creation
Ability to conduct investigative interviews with team members and customers for case studies and insights
Basic understanding of programmatic content and how to work with technical teams

scope.surface: SEO-optimized content creation (blog posts, use cases, case studies, landing page copy) to establish ElevenLabs as thought leader in AI Audio
scope.business_model: B2B and B2C AI audio SaaS (API, agents, creative tools)
cross_functional_partners: Customers and team members (for case studies)
core_responsibilities: Create compelling blog posts, use cases, case studies, and landing page copy
Drive organic search visibility and traffic growth through SEO-optimized content
Work closely with SEO & Growth team to understand keyword opportunities, search intent, and content gaps
Cover user journeys, use case deep-dives, and educational blog posts for new products
Establish ElevenLabs as the thought leader in AI Audio

green_flags: Remote-global role with no location restrictions (#LI-Remote)
Explicitly states no background in growth, SEO, or marketing required — open to high-potential generalists
Company has clear SEO traction (1M+ users/month, authority score 69 on SEMRush) — gives meaningful context for scope
Strong company momentum: $781M raised, $11B valuation, blue-chip investors (a16z, Sequoia, ICONIQ)
Annual L&D stipend, social travel stipend, company offsite — strong benefits for a remote role
red_flags: No years-of-experience floor stated — seniority and career stage expectations are ambiguous
Company has no job titles — unusual and may create career progression uncertainty
High-velocity, high-autonomy culture ('work autonomously from day one') may not suit candidates who need structured onboarding

fields_inferred_not_stated: seniority.level (inferred from 'college or personal projects' framing and 'high potential generalist' language)
scope.primary_metrics_inferred (not stated in JD; inferred from role context)
location.remote_us_eligible (inferred from #LI-Remote tag and 'Global team: We prioritize your talent, not your location')
location.work_auth (inferred as open from global remote stance)
ambiguities: No explicit visa sponsorship statement — could not determine yes/no; marked 'unclear'

Seniority is ambiguous: JD welcomes candidates with only college or personal project writing experience, yet the role involves scaling a high-traffic SEO channel — actual expectations may differ from what the JD signals
